_comment: Brainstorm Artifact Manifest — auto-generated by /vp-brainstorm on /save and /end. Consumed by /vp-crystallize Step 0A.

ui_direction._comment: UI/UX direction doc — wireframes, layout decisions, component hierarchy

product_horizon._comment: Post-MVP / future features — deferred epics, tier 2/3 items

research_notes._comment: Stack research, API investigation, feasibility notes

architecture_inputs._comment: Architecture decisions, service boundaries, data flow choices from brainstorm

_ui_task_context_hint_comment: Array of file paths that should be added to TASK.md context_required for UI page tasks. Auto-populated from ui_direction artifact during brainstorm /save.
_decisions_comment: Array of {id, text, anchor, session_id} — populated when vp:decision anchors are created during /save
